stale_bugs_closed.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch — already fixed: build_default_factions() and save_system both use FACTION_SCORE_START=20.
Deterministic minigame selection — already fixed: pick_minigame_for_field() uses randi() instead of field.hash().

features_added.description: MerlinAmbientSystem — pure static ambient calculator. Blends biome (8 profiles) + season (4) + time-of-day (6 periods) + weather (5 types with season×biome probability). Returns 17-field dict with sky gradient, fog, particles, silhouette, lighting, weather, CRT params.

overall_assessment: First feature cycle. Ambient system provides the missing link between GameTimeManager and scene rendering. All 8 biomes × 4 seasons × 6 time periods produce distinct ambiances. Weather adds stochastic variety (mist heavier in marais, storms on cotes, snow in hiver). Next step: wire into Run3D scene controller.
